summary: UI/UX Batch Update Testing - All 16 features PASSED. Backend: All 7 header images accessible, AI generate-blog-seo returns 'title' field, newsletter send-bulk endpoint working. Frontend: All 7 pages have background image headers with titles in Cinzel font, /blog page has Producer's Playbook image with blue glow, compact blog cards with cover images, pill-shaped 'Get The Playbook' button. /armory cards have correct structure (aspect-square image + info strip). Admin blog modal has slug regenerate button, sticky editor toolbar, and AI overlay includes 'Post Title' as first section.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 16 UI/UX batch update features verified. PageHeader component renders background images for all 7 pages (about, films, armory, den, investors, workwithus, contact). Blog page has playbook image with blue glow and pill-shaped button. Armory cards use aspect-square for images with object-contain. Admin blog modal has slug regen button on Basics tab, sticky toolbar on Content tab, and AI overlay shows 'Post Title' section. All data-testid attributes working correctly.
